column1: # DawnLike tileset mapping for Knights of Camelot
# Maps game entities to sprite coordinates in DawnLike sprite sheets.
# All tiles are 16x16 pixels. Coordinates are tile indices (not pixels).
# sheet: path relative to tiles/ directory
# id: unique identifier used by the renderer to look up tiles
# DawnLike ships SDS_8x8.ttf and SDS_6x6.ttf in GUI/ for text rendering.
# Use GUI/SDS_8x8.ttf for UI text in the SDL backend.
